name: hcportal_getCountries
description: Returns a list of all countries from HC.Country, ordered alphabetically by CountryName. Used for populating country dropdowns in the portal. Requires standard portal authentication.

parameters.name: publicHasherId
parameters.description: Auth: the authenticated user's public hasher ID. Validated via HC6.ValidatePortalAuth.

parameters.name: accessToken
parameters.description: Auth: short-lived cryptographic token validated via HC6.ValidatePortalAuth.

rowsets.name: ErrorEnvelope
rowsets.description: Returned on any validation, auth, or runtime error. Short-circuits on first error.

rowsets.name: CountriesResult
rowsets.description: List of all countries ordered alphabetically by CountryName. Only returned on successful authentication.

breakingChangeRules: Never remove a column from any rowset
Never change a sentinel value meaning
